work_1_description: Designing and optimizing low power solutions for Snapdragon SoCs; Contributed to the power architecture and design of low power methodologies at SoC level, using IEEE UPF standard and various low power tools; Performed power aware synthesis, simulations, and quality checks, as well as post-Si correlation activities.

paper_1_title: A 0.4uA Offset, 6ns Sensing-time Multi-level Sense Amplifier for Resistive Non-Volatile Memories in 65nm LSTP Technology
